Get A Free Audit

MAXIMIZE YOUR ONLINE VISIBILITY WITH GOOGLE ADS

Creekside Marketing combines $20M+ in audited ad spend, 200+ account audits, and high-performing frameworks to make Google Ads work for your business—not the other way around. We build tightly themed, conversion-focused campaigns that show up when high-intent customers are searching.

Whether you're a local service provider or a nationwide brand, our campaigns are backed by expert tracking, constant optimization, and clear reporting. You get fast results, lower costs, and real growth.

PERFORMANCE DATA & AD ANALYSIS

Biweekly reviews of your Google Ads data, targeting insights, and ROI metrics to ensure optimal campaign performance

GOOGLE ADS CAMPAIGN OPTIMIZATION

We manage and optimize your Google Ads from setup to scale—driving more clicks and conversions @ lower costs

CONVERSION TRACKING & REPORTING

We track every lead, call, and form submission using GA4, and GTM—giving us actionable insights to improve your ad performance.

Drive Targeted Traffic and Measure Success

We don’t just drive traffic—we track every click, call, form fill, and booking with expert setups in GA4, Google Tag Manager, and Meta Pixel. Your entire funnel is measured and optimized, so you're not guessing which ads are working.

From custom conversion events to CRM integrations, we give you a complete view of ROI. Our team handles everything from launch to optimization, including:

  • Keyword research & negative keyword pruning
  • Ad copy A/B testing
  • Manual or smart bidding (based on data)
  • Weekly optimizations and strategic scaling
